titleStmt.title: SII 24.112: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 112. (A.R. No. 128 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records another assignment of tax-free land by sale to Tirumaḻapāḍi Durga •••• Bhaṭṭan alias Śrī Śaḍagōpanambi Aḻagiya-maṇavāḷapperumāḷ, a tārkkāṇi of Iḷavēḷūr, in Kavijanakaṟpagachchēri in Gaṇḍarādittachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Poygai-nāḍu in Tyāgavalli-vaḷanāḍu, for supply of garlands to the temple. The endowed land was to be named Śaḍagōpaviḷāgam, after the assignee. Mentions Śrīkāridēvaviḷāgam endowed by Nīlagaṅgaraiyar, probably as one of the boundaries of the gift land. The record is dated in the 3rd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭantu pon mālai tikaḻtara pāmālai malinta paṉmaṇit tiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷḷiruppa tanvaraimārpan tanateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷ ḷorutani Iruppa
kalaimakaḷ coltiṟam puṇarn=ta kaṟpinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvanamuḻutuṅ kavippator putumatipol veṇ kuṭai mimicainiḻa
ṟṟa karuṅkali Oḷittu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅkavīman vilaṅka mimicai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kanaleri parukavum Aympaṭaip paruvattu vem paṭai tāṅ
kiyum veṅkaimaṇṭalan=tāṅkini tiruntum vaṭaticai yaṭippapaṭuttaruḷit tenticait tarumamum tavamum tānamun taḻaippa vetamum nitiyum meymeyum Ātiyukam pola talai ciṟappa vantaru
ḷi velaṅkaḷum poṟpuliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟai maṇimakuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭa mannuyiṟ kellām Innuyiṟ tāy pol tannoḷi parappi tanittani parattu maṇmuḻutu kaḷippa manuneṟivaḷa
rttu tan koyiṟ koṟṟavācar puṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muṟacukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum mel mel Oṅka ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaku ciṅkaṇarañci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kannaṭar venniṭak koṅkarotu
ṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟteṟaticai mannarum tan tamakkaraṇena tirumalaṟ cevaṭi Urimaiyiliṟaiñci tollai Eḻulakun toḻuteḻat tonṟiya mullai vāṇakaik koṭi mukko(ḷa)kkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaran Imaiyac cimai
yattiruntanaṉena porutti Uṭaniruppa Āṅkavan makuḻuṅ kaṅkaiyoppākiya tari vayar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭantai punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuṭai yāḷ Avaṉ tiruvuḷḷattaruḷ muḻutuṭaiyāḷena Irup
pa cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu śrīkāriyam vicaiyālayaviḻupparai
yar Evaṟpaṭi Āḻvārkanmikaḷil śrīvaiyiṣṇavāriyam kuṇṭur paḷḷikoṇṭā nampiyum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr ci caṭakopatāsarum Olikoṉṟai śrī Āvatu[śrīkāryam] vicaiyālaya viḻupparai
bhīṣaṇanampiyum Irāyūr tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum surasārait tiruvaraṅkamāṉa nampiyum tiruvāyppāṭi nampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭa rikanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutum Āritan cirākavanum cikāri
māṟaṉum kaśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum pāratāyan ciriḷaṅkok keruṭ vākaṉanum pāratāyan tiruveṅkaṭavaṉ ciṅkamum sabhaikkaṇakku Araiyan Ampalak kūttanāṉa tiruvaraṅkappiriyanum [śrī]vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku
Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyā(nu)ṉāṉa śrīvayiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmi kaḷom vaṭakarai tiyākavallivaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭu brabhade yamśrīkaṇṭa rātitta caturvetimaṅkalattu śrīkavijaṉakaṟpakacceri Iḷaveḷūr tārk kāṇi
ttirumaḻapāṭittuṟka paṭṭanāna śrīcaṭakopanampi Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cāttiyaruḷukaikkut tirukkaṟaiyil Ivaṉ ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavāṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkkellai [śrī]villi puttūr
ttirunantavāṉattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai nāṭaṟipukaḻaṉ tirunanta vāṉattukku vaṭakkum mi(y)pārkkellai koṭṭaiyūr Āḻ koṇṭavalli tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai tiruveṭṭai poṉa
peruvaḻikku teṟkkum Āka Ivvicain=ta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam teṟkaṭaiyac caṭakopan tirunantavanam kuḻi 2 100 Icaṭakopan tirunantavanattukku tirunantavanappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷaṭuttuk kuṭutta nilamā
vatu Irājamahentiravaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrk kūṟṟattu Āḻvār tirumaṭaip paḷḷip puṟamānataṟku mappāl ṅkuṭaiyarāna nilakaṅkaraiyar ceyvitta śrīkāri teva viḷākam tiruttaṟat tirutti Innilattukku puṉcey
veṇṭukaiyilum vāḻaippaḻa Amutum veṇṭukaiyilum Icciyārūrtevan tirunantavanam ceykiṟa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷadāsar makkaḷ Icci yārūrtevaviḷākattu vaṭakkiṟ
Āḻvār nilamāyp piṟinta nilattukku Icain=ta kiḻpāṟkellai kaṟkuṭi nirpāyum perumayakkalukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai śrīkāritevaviḷākattukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai kaṟkuṭi nirpāyum vaṭavūruṭaiyān vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ ke
llai cikurukūr macakkalukku teṟkum Ivvicainta perunānkellai yuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam ṅkālum kaykkoṇṭu ciricaṭakopan viḷākamennum tirunāmat tāl tiruttaṟat tirutti puncey varicai paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl
velic ceykku Eṇkalamāka van=ta nellum Innilattal vanta Amutu tirunantavanañ ceyyum Āḷiraṇṭukku Āḷonṟukku (ḷonṟuk) kuṟuṇiyum yonṟum
Āka Āḷiraṇṭukku Āṇṭu varai paḻaiya nel nārppatin kalamum puṭavai mutal kācu
Iraṇṭukku nel Irupatin kalamum Āka nel Eṇpatin kalattukku nila
yitu koṇṭu p peṟuvārākavum Innila ceṉnīr veṭṭi Allatu maṟṟepper
paṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavānallātānākavum śrīcaṭakopan tirunaṉtavaṉamum śrī caṭako
paviḷākamum ceyyum [pattupākavar ?] śrīvaiyiṣṇavadāsarum Ivan makan tirunaṟai Ārā Amutum
kaiyile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvarākavum Ippaṭikku kon makan Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku koyil kaṇakku Araiyan taneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu
ṉṟai śrīvibhīṣaṇa nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Irāyūr tirunāṭu nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku surasārait tiruvaraṅka māḷinampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi tiruvāy ṭi dāsar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ārita
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan muṭaiyāneḻuttu Itu śrīvaiyiṣṇava rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
